PHP classes for integrating Cppcheck and cpplint, Phutil library registration, and firmware linting scripts.

## Folders
- **[cppcheck](cppcheck/README.md)**: PHP class for integrating Cppcheck into the Arcanist linting framework for C/C++ static analysis.
- **[cpplint](cpplint/README.md)**: Python script for C++ linting, license terms, and PHP class for integrating `cpplint.py`.

## Files
- **[__phutil_library_init__.php](__phutil_library_init__.php.md)**: Registers the 'linters' library using Phutil in the Pebble firmware codebase.
- **[__phutil_library_map__.php](__phutil_library_map__.php.md)**: Defines a library map for registering linter classes in the Pebble firmware codebase.
- **[fw_linter.py](fw_linter.py.md)**: Python script for firmware linting with multiple linter subclasses to detect specific code issues.
